task_description: Implement genius-level Firestore read reduction optimizations in the billing app's script.js. Date-bound the bills and daybook listeners to today only, cache the product catalog in localStorage, increase live draft sync debounce with content-hash deduplication, add conditional rendering to daybook, and auto-cleanup stale live drafts.

verification.summary: No build system or tests exist. Syntax validated with acorn --ecma2022 --module (exit code 0). All grep checks confirm the optimizations are in place: date-bounded queries, catalog cache, debounced sync with hash, visibility guard, stale cleanup.
